review_text:
PUBG Mobile used to be one of the best battle royale games. Simple, intense, and skill-based.

But now every update adds more unnecessary events and features that nobody asked for. Many old players came back because they missed the classic PUBG feeling, but these new events are ruining it again.

Please remember why players loved PUBG in the first place. We don’t need more complicated events. We just want the classic PUBG experience back.
title: Update and new event pubg

review_text:
PUBG mobile can be very fun and a very entertaining game. As a matter of fact that times it is a blast! Great graphics, great audio love the real time chat with teammates. The game can be very strategic,learn the map. I have been playing for years. However, today I deleted the game.. 
The game is inconsistent and still plagued with cheating. It’s too frustrating to invest 20 to 30 minutes in a match only to be eliminated by a blatant cheater. Hopefully the developer continue to combat cheating and maybe one day eliminate it completely.
When that happens, I will be back.
title: Fun game but…

review_text:
Tl;dr: Game management has clearly moved to someone new and they’re pushing their new game with the title of PUBG. Uninstalling and reporting the app

— 

This isn’t even the same game anymore and I’m uninstalling. On top of a horrendous UI that’s impossible to navigate, many settings just aren’t there. Don’t want blaring loud non-themed music not fitting to a video game at all? Well looks like you’re out of luck because that’s apparently integral to the game’s structure. Want to play without spending a ton of money? Good luck, every misclick somehow takes you to the store and clicking the “X” will only take you to a different, but new store page — restarting the app is the only way out of their store once you click on anything within the store to view. 

Accounts are also deleted every season. “I think you mean reset” no, deleted. Every season I have to sign up for a new account and profile (and btw, you can’t pick your username or change it anymore) with reset game stats and no clothing/gear skins (hope you didn’t actually buy anything).
title: I’ve played since alpha on PC. This is not PUBG

Dear PUBG MOBILE Support Team,

Hello, I am a loyal PUBG MOBILE player who has been playing since Season 5 until now. During all these years, I have continuously supported and enjoyed the game, participated in many events, and opened numerous crates and lucky spins.

One of my biggest wishes in the game is to obtain the M416 Glacier skin. Unfortunately, despite playing for such a long time and trying many times, I have never been lucky enough to get it.

I understand that skins are based on luck and probability, but I sincerely hope you can understand the feelings of long-term players like me who have stayed with the game for many seasons. The M416 Glacier is a dream skin for me, and receiving it would truly make me very happy and motivated to continue supporting PUBG MOBILE.

If there is any possible way to help, special event consideration, or future opportunity for long-time loyal players, I would be deeply grateful.

Thank you for your time and for creating a game that I have enjoyed for many years.

Sincerely,
A Loyal PUBG MOB
title: Dear Sir

review_text:
Thank you PUBG MONILE for responding to our below request. 

Hello PUBG Mobile Support Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am writing this message to respectfully express my concern regarding the name of the item “Hand of the Almighty” (or any translated version referring to “Al-Jabbar”) in 4.4 new update. As Muslim players, many of us feel uncomfortable with the usage of this name inside the game because “Al-Jabbar” is one of the 99 Names of Allah in Islam and holds deep religious and spiritual significance for millions of Muslims around the world.

We fully understand that the intention behind the name may not have been offensive. However, using sacred religious names in entertainment content, cosmetics, weapons, or game items can be considered disrespectful or insensitive by many members of the Muslim community.

PUBG Mobile has a massive player base across Islamic countries, and many loyal Muslim players love and support the game. For this reason, we kindly ask your team to reconsider and change the name of this item to something more neutral and respectful that does not relate to sacred religious attributes.

This small change would show respect for cultural and religious diversity and would be greatly appreciated by Muslim players everywhere. We believe PUBG Mobile always tries to create a positive environment for all communities and cultures, and we hope our feedback will be taken seriously.

Thank you for your understanding, your time, and your continued efforts to improve the game experience for everyone.

Sincerely,
Concerned Muslim PUBG Mobile Players
title: Report 4.4 Update 10 May 2026

PUBG MOBILE 
مش هنحدث نطالب بتغير اسم البطاقه الاول
نحن كلاعبين مسلمين نحترم جميع الأديان والمعتقدات، ونرى أن استعمال عبارة “يد الجبار” داخل بطاقة أو عنصر ترفيهي في اللعبة قد يُفهم منه إساءة أو تقليل من أسماء وصفات الله سبحانه وتعالى عند فئة كبيرة من المسلمين.
لذلك نطلب من إدارة PUBG Studios وTencent Games مراجعة هذه البطاقة وإزالتها أو تغيير اسمها إلى اسم آخر لا يمس بالمقدسات الدينية.
هدفنا ليس الهجوم أو إثارة الجدل، بل إيصال صوت اللاعبين بطريقة محترمة حفاظًا على مشاعر ملايين المسلمين حول العالم.
نأمل منكم التفاعل الإيجابي والاهتمام بمطالب مجتمع اللعبة، لأن الاحترام المتبادل بين الشركات واللاعبين هو أساس نجاح أي لعبة عالمية.
وشكرًا لتفهمكم.

review_text:
@امبـــر: Request to Bring Back the Old PUBG Settings
Hello PUBG Team,
I am a regular PUBG player and I want to share my opinion about the recent update. The new UI and the changed settings are not comfortable for many players. The old interface was simple, smooth, and easy to use, but the new one feels complicated and confusing.
Many players are facing difficulties in finding settings and controlling the game like before. The previous system helped us play better and enjoy the game more.
We respect the effort of the developers, but we kindly request you to bring back the old UI and settings, or at least give players an option to switch between the old and new versions.
PUBG became popular because of its simple and player-friendly design. We hope you will listen to the community and consider bringing the old settings back.
Thank you.

I am a regular PUBG player and I want to share my opinion about the recent update. The new UI and the changed settings are not comfortable for many players. The old interface was simple, smooth, and easy to use, but the new one feels complicated and confusing.
Many players are facing difficulties in finding settings and controlling the game like before. The previous system helped us play better and enjoy the game more.
We respect the effort of the developers, but we kindly request you to bring back the old UI and settings, or at least give players an option to switch between the old and new versions.
PUBG became popular because of its simple and player-friendly design. We hope you will listen to the community and consider bringing the old settings back.

Fix it as soon as possible,
Thank you.
title: Request to Bring Back the Old PUBG Settings

review_text:
"I’ve been playing PUBG since the beginning, but the game has lost its soul. I’m asking the developers to please bring back a 'Classic Mode' or a 'Legacy Version' that captures the 2018, 2019, and 2020 era.
Back then, the game was about pure survival and strategy. Now, it feels cluttered with neon skins, flying vehicles, and 'recall' mechanics that take away the stakes of a Battle Royale. We miss the gritty atmosphere, the original Erangel lighting, and the simple UI.
What we want back:
• The Original Vibe: Bring back the darker, more realistic graphics and the survival horror feel.
• Tactical Gameplay: No more crazy power-ups or element-bending abilities. Just boots on the ground, looting, and shooting.
• Less Clutter: The lobby is now full of pop-ups and ads. We want the clean, simple interface from 2019.
• Classic Maps: Give us the original versions of Erangel and Sanhok without the futuristic additions.
Please listen to your veteran players. We don't want a new game every month; we want the masterpiece we fell in love with years ago. #BringBackOldPUBG"

Thank you.
title: Bring Golden Era PUBG back

review_text:
PUBG has officially ruined its own game. Rank push is no longer about skill, strategy, or improvement — it’s about pure grinding, luck, and suffering. Every season they make ranking harder, not smarter. Matchmaking is broken, teammates are useless, enemies feel unbalanced, and the whole system feels designed to waste your time instead of rewarding good gameplay.

Desync, lag, random deaths, hit registration issues — all still here. But instead of fixing core problems, the developers keep adding useless updates, skins, and changes nobody asked for. The game feels more frustrating than fun, and every match feels like punishment instead of entertainment.

This is no longer a competitive game, it’s a stress simulator. PUBG doesn’t respect players’ time, effort, or skill. If you’re thinking about starting or pushing rank seriously, don’t. Save your nerves, your time, and your sanity.

Absolutely disappointing.

review_text: PUBG Mobile isn't just a game—it's a symphony of adrenaline-pumping action, flawless teamwork, and heart-stopping victories that keep me hooked for hours on end! From the moment I drop into the electrifying battlegrounds, every match feels like an epic saga where strategy meets sheer excitement. The graphics are jaw-droppingly stunning, with lush environments that pull you into a world of tactical brilliance and unexpected ambushes. The controls are buttery smooth, making every headshot and vehicle chase feel like second nature. Teaming up with friends turns ordinary sessions into legendary tales of clutch revives and squad wipes that leave us roaring with laughter and high-fives. The constant updates flood in fresh maps, modes, and cosmetics that keep the experience endlessly innovative and personal. PUBG Mobile has transformed my downtime into peak entertainment—it's addictive in the best way, fostering bonds and delivering pure, unadulterated joy. If you're not playing this masterpiece yet, you're missing out on mobile gaming's crown jewel. 10/10, forever in my rotation!

dominator players and I am a dominator player myself and I still feel like I’m experiencing a match with at least 60% of the people being bots which is crazy the only match I can enjoy is ultimate royal which is really the only reason why I play. They need to fix these bot lobbies otherwise the game is just going to become boring. Ive also read a lot of forums with people saying the same thing so its not an isolated issue.
title: Bot Lobbies Ruining the Game
